stemHtml: When creating an FMS waypoint using a VOR/DME reference, which of the following three elements must be entered?

options.a: Select the waypoint page, enter the GPS track, and enter the altitude.
options.b: Select the VOR/DME station, enter the magnetic bearing, and enter the slant range.
options.c: Select the VOR/DME station, enter the true bearing, and enter the air distance.
options.d: Select the VOR/DME station, enter the radial, and enter the ground distance (DME distance).
